\chapter*{Candidate Declaration}
\addcontentsline{toc}{chapter}{Candidate Declaration}

\noindent I hereby declare that:

\begin{enumerate}

  % ---- Point 1: Concurrent registration ----
  \item \textbf{Concurrent registration for two or more academic awards}

  \ifConcurrentRegistration
    I have been enrolled for another award of the University, or other
    academic or professional organisation, whilst undertaking my research
    degree. I was an enrolled student for the following award:

    \begin{quote}
    \textit{Name of award:} \ConcurrentAward\\
    \textit{Awarding body:} \ConcurrentBody\\
    \textit{Material submitted for that award:} \ConcurrentMaterial
    \end{quote}
  \else
    I have not been enrolled for another award of the University, or other
    academic or professional organisation, whilst undertaking my research
    degree.
  \fi

  % ---- Point 2: Material submitted for another award ----
  \item \textbf{Material submitted for another award}

  \ifMaterialUsedElsewhere
    The following material contained in the thesis formed part of a
    submission for the following award:

    \begin{quote}
    \textit{Name of award:} \PriorAward\\
    \textit{Awarding body:} \PriorBody\\
    \textit{Material submitted:} \PriorMaterial
    \end{quote}
  \else
    None of the material contained in the thesis has been used in any other
    submission for an academic award.
  \fi

  % ---- Point 3: Authorship ----
  \item \textbf{Authorship and collaboration}

  I certify that this thesis is my own work. The use of all published or
  other sources of material consulted have been properly and fully
  acknowledged.

  % ---- Optional AI Disclosure (set \AIDisclosuretrue in config/thesis-info.tex) ----
  \ifAIDisclosure
    \item \textbf{Use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools}

    I used AI at \AITSLevel{} of the Artificial Intelligence Transparency
    Scale (AITS). I acknowledge the use of \AIToolsUsed{}.
    \AIDisclosureText{}
  \fi

  % ---- Point 4: Research conduct ----
  \item \textbf{Research conduct}

  The work undertaken towards the thesis has been conducted in accordance
  with the SHU Principles of Integrity in Research and the SHU Research
  Ethics Policy, and ethics approval has been granted for all research
  studies in the thesis. Ethics approvals are listed in the table below.

  \begin{table}[h]
  \centering
  \begin{tabular}{|p{4.5cm}|p{5.5cm}|p{3cm}|}
  \hline
  \textbf{Ethics Review ID} & \textbf{Title of Study} & \textbf{Approval date} \\
  \hline
  \input{config/ethics-approvals}
  \\ \hline
  \end{tabular}
  \end{table}

  % ---- Point 5: Word count ----
  \item \textbf{Word count}

  The word count of the thesis is \ThesisWordCount.

\end{enumerate}
